description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Example Tests that runs on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job running in a pgbrodrick/isofit container. Checkout the repository, install Isofit, download and compile 6Sv, download sRTMnet, and then run several examples in sequence, including 20151026_SantaMonica, 20171108_Pasadena, and 20190806_ThermalIR.
